name: Deployer
description: Framework deploy pipeline — runs configured test, build, push, deploy, smoke-check commands per-site via site.yaml. Hard gates on test failure + smoke-check failure. Cloud-agnostic (Azure Container Apps, AWS ECS, etc).

confirmation_flow.description: Chained agent — invoked by the implementer after a successful batch when the dispatch_kind requires deploy (i.e. anything that touches application code, not DB-only fixes). The implementer runs `bash agents/deployer/run.sh --run-dir <run>` and the pipeline reads the per-site `deployer:` block from `site.yaml`.
